overall.description: Gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style open world game featuring a character walking through a rain-slicked futuristic city with towering neon-lit buildings and holographic advertisements, transitioning to a first-person exploration sequence on a luxury yacht deck and interior. The footage showcases high-fidelity rendering with reflective wet surfaces, dynamic holographic elements, and atmospheric blue-hour lighting.

segments.scene_description: Following a character with red hair through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street lined with towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The Petrochem sign glows in the distance while holographic fish swim across building facades. The character walks past other pedestrians and briefly sits on a bench before continuing forward.

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive orange holographic fish swimming between the towering cyberpunk buildings. As the camera pans left, a golden building facade comes into view alongside a blue holographic fish, showcasing the futuristic advertising technology in the blue-hour sky.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a first-person perspective walking on the wet deck of a luxury yacht at Del Beach Marina. The camera moves forward between metal railings toward a dark angular cabin entrance, with modern curved buildings visible in the overcast marina background.

segments.scene_description: Entering the yacht's luxurious interior lounge featuring white leather sectional sofas, a modern bar area, and blue ambient ceiling lighting. The space has a sleek futuristic design with geometric floor patterns, a rotating ceiling fan, and large windows showing the marina outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at street level in a rain-slicked cyberpunk city and ascends to reveal the scale of the futuristic skyline. It begins by following a red-haired character through a neon-lit district, passing pedestrians and a bench while the glow of a distant Petrochem sign reflects off the wet pavement. As the character continues forward, the camera tilts upward, shifting focus from the ground to the towering buildings adorned with holographic fish swimming across their facades. The scene then expands as the camera pans left, transitioning from the street-level bustle to a wide view of a golden building facade and a blue holographic fish set against the deep tones of a blue-hour sky.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the rain-slicked exterior of a luxury yacht into its sleek, high-tech interior. It begins by gliding across the wet deck at Del Beach Marina, moving between metal railings toward a dark, angular cabin entrance against a backdrop of overcast skies and curved modern buildings. As the camera crosses the threshold, the outdoor grayness gives way to a luxurious lounge defined by blue ambient ceiling lighting and geometric floor patterns. The scene then expands to reveal a futuristic living space featuring white leather sectional sofas and a modern bar area, while large windows maintain a visual connection to the marina outside.
